SEARCH
Package com.example.vigilante

Class Event

java.lang.Object
com.example.vigilante.Event
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Event extends Object implements Serializable
This class is used to create a Event object which is used by other classes such as addEvent and AllEventActivity to grab data
See Also:
